contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Fix autopilot email poller crash, LLM timeouts, and Telegram multi-topic blocking
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/51
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed and fixed three production issues on truesight_autopilot EC2:
  
  1. email_poller.py — _json NameError crash: the bugsnag error handler used _json (undefined) instead of json, causing every Bugsnag email poll to fail every 5 minutes with 'name _json is not defined' since May 26. Fixed to use the correct json import.
  
  2. LLM timeouts — Switched LLM_PROVIDER from bigmodel (GLM-4.5) to deepseek (deepseek-chat). BigModel was regularly timing out ('The read operation timed out') rendering the governor chat bot unreliable. DeepSeek is ~20x more expensive per token but ~30x cheaper than Claude and far more reliable for tool-calling workloads.
  
  3. Telegram multi-topic blocking — The update loop processed messages sequentially, so chatting in one topic blocked all other topics for the duration of the LLM call (30-180s). Fixed by dispatching each message to a background ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=10), allowing concurrent topic sessions.
  
  PR: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/51
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
